privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Julian Rossi. Province of Residence: BC. The scenario requires completing a tax return for a consulting business (Form T2125) with a secondary establishment in Alberta, requiring Form T2203 for provincial allocation (BC/AB). Other verified complexities in the scenario include Dependent Disability Transfer, T778 Childcare Limits, and T5 Foreign Tax Credit. The final file must be saved exactly as 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\julian_rossi.24t'.
